indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring provides a smooth, non-slip surface suitable for placing a yoga mat.

indicators.name: unobstructed floor area
indicators.rationale: The open floor space allows for a yoga mat to be placed without obstructions.

indicators.name: minimal furniture
indicators.rationale: The presence of only a few chairs and a dining table minimizes obstructions on the floor.

indicators.name: large windows
indicators.rationale: Natural light from the large windows can create a calming atmosphere for yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for yoga / stretching due to the presence of minimal furniture and an open floor area. However, the lack of a dedicated yoga mat and the presence of a dining table and chairs limit the suitability of this space for yoga practice.
